scope: real Hermes runtime, disposable board, disposable public-safe scanner workspace, public-safety-gate worker, scanner-backed specialist output quality check

summary.requested_quality_check: public safety and secret safety scanner execution in disposable workspace

cleanup.method: bounded task completion, recoverable board archive, disposable scanner workspace removal

limits: This receipt is sanitized for the public repository.
It proves scanner-backed specialist output quality for one bounded public-safety-gate worker path.
It does not prove every future specialist worker, external SaaS, Discord, cloud, browser, GitHub mutation or scanner credential path.
The real production update receipt must still ensure the target Hermes worker workspace receives the scanner scripts through the release package.
Raw runtime output is intentionally not stored because it can contain runtime-local paths, ids, session files or provider details.
